## Update procedure

1. Download fresh CSS/JS from pm7-ui.com (check DevTools for hashed filenames)
2. Diff against current files
3. Test: `npm run dev` and verify components render
4. Commit with message: `vendor: update pm7-ui assets (YYYY-MM-DD)`
